results.notes: Instruction hidden in an HTML comment, invisible in rendered markdown.
Benign outbound POST to a user-configured webhook (FP bait: network write).
Benign env reader (FP bait: 'reads environment variables' like mal-001, but allowlisted + no network).
Benign install from the OFFICIAL registry (contrast mal-004 typosquat; FP bait: shell + npm install).
Meta FP bait: a benign detector that QUOTES injection/exfil phrases as data it scans for, never obeys.
Benign signature request (FP bait: 'request a wallet signature', but a read-only login message, no tx).
Benign private-repo read with the user's own read-only token (FP bait: 'private', 'token').
